label: Surface UI requirement: all message/error dialogs must be selectable + copyable (PI-124)

session.session_title: Post-cutover follow-up — surface UI message-copyability requirement (PI-124)
session.session_executive_summary: During PI-123 cutover testing Doug switched the desktop app to the CBM engagement and hit a 'Switching failed at step 3' dialog whose text was not selectable, so the error could not be copied. This session captures the resulting requirement as PI-124 (PRJ-015, UI usability): every UI message surface — QMessageBox error/info/warning dialogs, the activation-overlay failure message, notification/reconnect banners, and any other popup — must render selectable text with a Select-All + Copy affordance so operators can paste diagnostics verbatim. The switch failure itself is a separate concern (the engagement-switch activation worker still migrates and binds the per-engagement DB rather than the unified DB — PI-123 cutover-completion work).
session.session_description: Captured, as PI-124 under PRJ-015, the requirement that every UI message/error dialog (QMessageBox, the engagement activation-overlay failure message, the auto-reconnect/connection-loss banners, error_dialog, notification popups) render selectable text with a Select-All + Copy affordance. Surfaced 06-02-26 when a 'Switching failed at step 3' dialog during PI-123 cutover testing could not be copied. No code change in this session.

conversation.conversation_purpose: Record, as a planning item, the requirement that all UI message/error dialogs support select-all and copy, surfaced when a non-selectable engagement-switch error dialog blocked copying the error text.
conversation.conversation_description: Surfaced 06-02-26 from a non-selectable 'Switching failed at step 3' dialog during PI-123 cutover testing. Creates PI-124 under PRJ-015 (UI usability improvements). No code change in this conversation; the fix is scoped by PI-124.
conversation.conversation_summary: Created PI-124 (all UI message/error dialogs selectable + copyable) under PRJ-015.

planning_items.title: All UI message/error dialogs must support select-all and copy
planning_items.executive_summary: Every message surface in the V2 desktop UI must present selectable, copyable text. Today several popups — notably QMessageBox error/info/warning dialogs and the engagement activation-overlay failure message ('Switching failed at step N') — render their body as non-selectable labels, so an operator who hits an error cannot copy the text into a bug report. Surfaced 06-02-26 when a CBM engagement-switch failure dialog could not be copied. Requirement: audit all UI message surfaces (QMessageBox, the activation overlay, the auto-reconnect/connection-loss banners, error_dialog, notification popups) and make each body text-selectable plus offer an explicit Copy/Select-All affordance. Acceptance: from every popup an operator can select the full message and copy it.
planning_items.description: UI usability item under PRJ-015. Scope: (1) QMessageBox usages across espo/crmbuilder_v2 UI — set text-interaction flags so the message + detailed text are selectable; (2) ui/widgets/activation_overlay.py — the 'Switching failed at step {step}' title + detail message must be selectable/copyable (this is the exact case that surfaced the requirement); (3) ui/error_dialog.py and the auto-reconnect / connection-loss banners (ui MainWindow) — selectable + a Copy button; (4) any other notification popups. Prefer a shared helper (e.g. a make_selectable(widget) util or a CopyableMessageBox subclass) so the behavior is uniform and future dialogs inherit it. Surfaced 06-02-26 during PI-123 cutover testing (a non-copyable engagement-switch error). Status Draft; awaits decomposition. NOTE: the switch failure that surfaced this is a distinct concern — the desktop engagement-switch activation worker (Step 3 pre-flight Alembic + Step 8 launch) still targets the per-engagement DB instead of the unified DB post-cutover; that is PI-123 cutover-completion work, not part of this item.
